seoTitle: Codrington vs Coffee Camp — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Codrington and Coffee Camp. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Codrington vs Coffee Camp: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Codrington and Coffee Camp.
heading: Codrington vs Coffee Camp — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Codrington, New South Wales and Coffee Camp, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Coffee Camp has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Codrington (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Codrington or Coffee Camp safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Codrington has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Coffee Camp scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Codrington scores 25/100 for bushfire risk. Coffee Camp scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Codrington or Coffee Camp?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Coffee Camp has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
